z80emu by Lin Ke-Fong, vendored from https://github.com/anotherlin/z80emu
(master branch, fetched 2026-07-13).

Upstream license statement (from the source headers):

    Copyright (c) 2012-2017 Lin Ke-Fong
    This code is free, do whatever you want with it.

Unmodified upstream files: z80emu.c, z80emu.h, instructions.h, macros.h,
tables.h.

Appletini-specific files (replacing the upstream configuration templates):
z80config.h, z80user.h. These bind the core to the PCPI Applicard emulation
in ps_sources/frontend/applicard_z80.[ch].
